import hashlib
import json
from typing import FrozenSet


def get_user_cache_key(user_id: int, filters: FrozenSet) -> str:
    return f"user:{user_id}:filters:{hash(filters)}"


def get_product_cache_key(product_ids: tuple) -> str:
    return f"products:{hash(product_ids)}"


def get_search_cache_key(params: tuple) -> str:
    key_data = json.dumps(params, sort_keys=True)
    key_hash = hashlib.sha256(key_data.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]
    return f"search:{key_hash}"


def get_report_cache_key(options: tuple) -> str:
    key_hash = hashlib.sha256(json.dumps(options, sort_keys=True).encode()).hexdigest()[:16]
    return f"report:{key_hash}"


cache = {}


def fetch_user_data(user_id: int, filters: dict):
    frozen_filters = frozenset(filters.items())
    key = get_user_cache_key(user_id, frozen_filters)
    if key in cache:
        return cache[key]
    data = load_user_data(user_id, filters)
    cache[key] = data
    return data
